meaning: n.凯列班(莎士比亚剧<<暴风雨>>中半人半兽形怪物),<喻>丑恶而残忍的人
examples: The rage of Caliban seeing his own face in a glass.
Is the rage of Caliban not seeing his own face in a glass.
Finally, and most tragically, Caliban becomes a parody of himself.
This year, for example, the names Caliban and Sycorax were proposed for the 16th and 17th moons of Uranus.
George was managing a 3rd Avenue eatery called Caliban.
